code.title: Code
code.description:
Code or business term provided by the system that raised the condition. These
should be searchable in order to help users or systems understand what went
wrong with the document.

message.title: Message
message.description: Message contains human readable details about the specific condition.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description:
Paths contains an array of JSON paths that maps the GOBL specific error
to a field inside the envelope that the condition is applied to.

bill.Fault.description: Fault provides a more formal structure for describing with a specific code what has been unacceptable about the source document, including potentially references to the fields causing issues.
